name: Red Wine Braised Chicken with Orecchiette Pasta
recipeIngredient: 6 Large Chicken Thighs, (3 Pounds), boned, skin removed
Salt And Freshly Ground Black Pepper -- to taste
1/2 Pound Fresh Shiitake Mushrooms (Stemmed), thickly sliced
1 Teaspoon Fresh Thyme And Sage, chopped
1/3 Cup Parsley (Preferably Flat Leaf), finely chopped
1/4 Cup Sun-Dried Tomatoes In Oil, drained, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Season chicken liberally with salt and pepper.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large, heavy-bottomed saucepan over high heat. Quickly brown chicken until browned on all sides, then remove and set aside.
3. Add mushrooms, onion, garlic, carrots, and celery to the pan. Sauté until very lightly browned.
4. Return chicken to the pan. Add wine, tomatoes, thyme, sage, and stock. Bring mixture to a simmer.
5. Cover and simmer for 25-30 minutes, or until chicken is tender. Remove chicken and cut into bite-sized pieces; set aside.
6. Strain braising liquid, reserving vegetables. Return the liquid to the pot. Boil vigorously and cook until reduced and slightly thickened (8-10 minutes). This concentrates flavors. Adjust seasoning with salt, pepper, and balsamic vinegar if using.
7. Add reserved meat and vegetables; heat through. Stir in parsley. Keep warm.
8. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of water to a boil. Season with salt. Cook pasta until just tender, drain, toss with basil, and sun-dried tomatoes.
9. Place pasta in the center of serving bowls. Ladle braised chicken sauce around and garnish with fresh basil sprigs and shaved cheese. Serve immediately.
Yield: 6 servings
